name: I-Wellness Marketing Group Inc.
summary: I-Wellness Marketing Group Inc. owns marketing rights for and develops health and fitness application. The company is developing 60K app, a health and fitness application for iPhone, Android, tablets, and desktop computers. It also operates a restaurant. The company was formerly known as Monarchy Ventures Inc. and changed its name to I-Wellness Marketing Group Inc. in February 2016. I-Wellness Marketing Group, Inc. is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
